message: Ciclo 23:41 PDT Jun 24 — WMS: DDDU5053469 CLOSED (receiving+putaway CLOSED, Jorge Dueñas, excluido). DDDU5053448 ya excluido (ciclo anterior, RN-5008297 CLOSED). DDDU5053094 VERDE en SPOT767 (drop-and-hook, RN-5008299 IMPORTED). EITU8174300 putaway sigue IN_PROGRESS. Outlook: 1 NO LEÍDO (TCNU1243715/TIIU7745643/BEAU5553433 citas Jun 25-26 DO not with UNIS). CAAU8362068 sin RN. YMS API temporalmente sin datos (totalCount 0, posible scope issue). 35 visibles + 17 excluidos = 52 rows.
